content: Magno Fernando da Fonseca (GitHub: magnocat) is the Executive Director of MagnoCat Tecnologia, based in Artur Nogueira, SP. He uses the alias 'ongam odnanref acesnof'. IMPORTANT: He is a distinct entity and is NOT the user of this system (who is 'Holloway'). Magno is a person of interest/subject in the knowledge base.
